title: Grid Collection - The Ultimate Number Placement Puzzle Collection
metaDescription: Grid Collection - A massive collection of grid-based number placement puzzles. Over 5,000 handcrafted levels across six grid sizes from 5x5 to 10x10. Test your strategic thinking!
ogDescription: A massive collection of grid-based number placement puzzles. Over 5,000 handcrafted levels across six grid sizes from 5x5 to 10x10. Free on the App Store.
twitterDescription: A massive collection of grid-based number placement puzzles. Over 5,000 handcrafted levels. Free on the App Store.
heroTagline: The ultimate collection of number placement puzzles. Six grid sizes from 5×5 to 10×10, over 5,000 levels, endless brain-teasing fun.
f1Body: From 5×5 to 10×10 — six grid sizes, each with hundreds of handcrafted levels. New content added regularly.
f2Body: Place numbers in sequence following movement rules. Simple to learn, challenging to master.
f3Body: Earn up to 3 stars per level. Achieve perfect runs to prove your mastery.
f4Body: Track progress with dozens of achievements. Complete milestones and become a legend.
f5Body: Your progress is automatically backed up to Game Center and restored on your other Apple devices — even after reinstalling.
f6Body: Distraction-free interface with modern, minimalist design. Pure puzzle focus.
step1Desc: Tap any cell to place your first number.
step2Desc: Jump 2 cells straight or 1 cell diagonally.
step3Desc: Fill all cells to complete the level!

demo.title: Try It Now
demo.subtitle: Play the first two levels right here — no download needed.
demo.start: Tap any active cell to begin.
demo.deadEnd: No moves left — tap Restart to try again.
demo.cta: Get 5,000+ levels on the App Store →
